list.title: System Configuration
list.description: Manage module-registered system defaults and user overrides.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search groups, items, or technical keys
list.resetConfirm: Delete this user override and return to the module default?
list.loadError: System configuration could not be loaded.
list.saveError: System configuration could not be saved.
list.resetError: System configuration could not be reset.
list.sensitiveEditHint: This configuration is sensitive. The current value is not echoed and remains masked after saving.

groupDescriptions.dashboardQuickActions: Manage dashboard home quick-action visibility and ranking.
groupDescriptions.coreHttpxLogRetention: Manage access log cleanup retention and batch policy.
groupDescriptions.coreLoggerLogRetention: Manage application log cleanup retention and batch policy.
groupDescriptions.auditLogRetention: Manage audit log cleanup retention and batch policy.

dashboardQuickActionsEnabled.title: Enabled
dashboardQuickActionsEnabled.description: Controls whether personalized dashboard quick actions are shown.

dashboardQuickActionsMaxItems.title: Maximum Items
dashboardQuickActionsMaxItems.description: Maximum personalized entries shown on the dashboard home page.

accessLogRetentionCleanup.title: Access Log Retention Cleanup
accessLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default cleanup configuration for access-log retention jobs.

appLogRetentionCleanup.title: App Log Retention Cleanup
appLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default cleanup configuration for app-log retention jobs.

auditLogRetentionCleanup.title: Audit Log Retention Cleanup
auditLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default cleanup configuration for audit-log retention jobs.

retentionDays.title: Log Retention Days
retentionDays.description: Delete logs older than this many days.

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Maximum rows deleted per cleanup batch.

dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.mostUsed: Prioritize the quick actions used most often.
dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.recent: Prioritize quick actions visited most recently.
dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.hybrid: Rank by recent visits, usage frequency, and system recommendations.
